category: Inducer of apoptosis and angiogenesis inhibitor

mechanism: Inhibits Src family kinases, BCR-ABL, and c-KIT
Inhibitor of VEGFR, PDGFR, and c-KIT
Inhibits CYP enzymes affecting AML cell signaling
additional_notes: Primarily used as an HIV protease inhibitor

mechanism: Shows off-target effects in cancer pathways
Affects AMPK/mTOR pathways influencing cancer cell metabolism
Affects thioredoxin reductase and may induce AML cell apoptosis
Functions in immunomodulation and antiangiogenic pathways
Possible effects in cyclic AMP related pathways in AML
Potential metabolic and proteasome inhibition in cancer cells
additional_notes: Used primarily as an alcohol-aversion drug

mechanism: Affects cell proliferation through mTOR pathways
